title: Persistence Recovery Bundle

source_items.title: Execution replay system with phase-aware event recording
Pre-cleanup commit enforcement to prevent silent work loss
Crash recovery system for orphaned sessions and workspaces

grouping_rationale: Both open issues harden the same persisted-attempt and workspace-lifecycle boundary, while #278 supplies the already-shipped replay/checkpoint substrate they depend on.
architectural_drift: #278 is already shipped locally and should not be reimplemented.
Recovery is not greenfield; attempt rows, checkpoints, and thread resume already exist.
Workspace cleanup currently assumes committed or disposable state, which is the exact silent-loss gap #319 is meant to close.
